% ============================================================================
% EDUCATION
% ============================================================================
\section*{EDUCATION}

\experienceheader{University of Indonesia (UI)}{Jakarta, Indonesia}{Bachelor of Computer Science, Information Systems}{Aug 2022 - Jun 2026 (Expected)}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item \textbf{GPA: 3.84/4.00}
    \item \textbf{Thesis Advisor:} Prof. Petrus Mursanto (Full Professor, former Dean of Faculty of Computer Science)
    \item \textbf{Thesis:} Implementation of Morris Mano Computer Architecture with Enhanced Jump Branching Capabilities on Xilinx Spartan-3AN FPGA Platform (XC3S700AN) using VHDL
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=0.5pt, topsep=0.5pt]
        \item Extended baseline architecture by implementing jump branching in datapath for complex control flow operations
        \item Designed and optimized digital logic circuits for hardware-level branching mechanisms
        \item Investigated hardware resource utilization and timing constraints for branching logic optimization
        \item Synthesized and tested on physical FPGA hardware, validating functional correctness and performance
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Relevant Coursework:} Computer Architecture, Operating Systems, Data Structures \& Algorithms, Introduction to AI \& Data Science, Statistics \& Probability, Data Communication Networks, Database Systems
\end{itemize}

\section*{WORK EXPERIENCE}

\experienceheader{Software Engineer Intern}{Traveloka}{Backend Development \& Automation}{Aug 2025 - Apr 2026}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Engineered secure Credential Management System with AES-GCM encryption and MongoDB, implementing automated credential rotation and audit logging for enterprise-grade security compliance
    \item Developed automated reschedule solution processing 1000+ daily bookings with 99.9\% accuracy, reducing manual intervention by 85\% through intelligent failover mechanisms and workflow optimization
    \item Enhanced CI/CD pipelines with automated API testing and leveraged GitHub Copilot CLI for AI-assisted development, accelerating feature delivery by 30\%
\end{itemize}

\experienceheader{Full Stack Developer Intern}{PT Magna Solusi Indonesia}{Enterprise Application Development}{Jan 2025 - Jun 2025}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, itemsep=1pt, topsep=1pt]
    \item Developed enterprise modules using Spring Boot and Angular with seamless frontend-backend integration, deploying across production environments
    \item Optimized PostgreSQL database performance through efficient query design, indexing strategies, and stored procedures, reducing average response time by 35\%
    \item Built RESTful APIs for microservice architecture handling 10,000+ daily requests with sub-200ms response times
\end{itemize}

%
% 2. Bullet point format: Action verb + Technology/Method + Impact/Metric
%    Good: "Engineered X using Y, achieving Z% improvement"
%    Bad: "Worked on X" or "Helped with Y"
%
% 3. Skills section: Tailor categories to job requirements
